overview: FinEdge ERP is a production-grade enterprise ERP and CRM platform for financial services teams. It features role-based dashboards, lead management, branch and staff directories, task tracking, attendance monitoring, finance analytics, and performance leaderboards — all with a premium fintech design, dark mode, and full mobile responsiveness.
features: Role-based dashboards for Admin, Branch Manager, Staff, and Finance Manager
Lead CRM with drag-and-drop Kanban board and conversion analytics
Branch and staff management with search, filters, and performance badges
Task management with Kanban, list, and calendar views
Attendance calendar heatmap with biometric sync and absentee analytics
Finance P&L charts, investment tracking, and loan portfolio
Performance leaderboards with top/low performer tracking
CSV export on all data tables
Bulk row selection and bulk actions across all data views
Advanced filters with saveable filter presets
Admin-only audit logs page with full action history
Full mobile responsiveness across all 15+ pages
Dark mode with OKLCH design system
